content: The iterative self-feedback loop of Self-Refine for output improvement can act as a "base backbone" to unify multiple inconsistent self-reflection perspectives in LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a multi-perspective self-refine framework that outperforms both single-perspective Self-Refine and static multi-perspective reflection without iterative refinement. This hybrid framework retains Self-Refine's key advantage of requiring no additional training or supervised data while addressing the limitation of single-perspective feedback blind spots that plagues vanilla Self-Refine.
